slide1.title: Healthy living begins here.
slide1.text: Our philosophy is rooted in an integrated approach to wellness, bridging the gap between physical health and emotional wellbeing.

slide2.title: Do you know your BMI?
slide2.text: Body mass index (BMI) is a measure of body fat based on height and weight that applies to adult men and women.

slide3.title: The GLP-1 solution
slide3.text: Medical weight loss has advanced. At LoCicero Health, we use evidence‑based medications within a physician‑supervised program to support sustainable results.
